title: Fadeout: Underground
description:
Вышло обновлениеGame is feature complete and has exited Early Access! - If you want to find players, join our community on Discord!

Об игреFadeout: Underground is a Third Person shooter in the vein of classic PC games from the late 90s and early 2000s. Inspired by games like Quake, Unreal Tournament, and Team Fortress with some unique twists.Fast-Paced CombatEach playable character features unique combat traits that never force you into playing a specific role.
Pick up weapons & gadgets on the map to augment your play style.
Fight in online multiplayer with several classic game-modes including; Death Match, Team Death Match, Capture the Flag, Arena, Team Arena, & Conquest!Features5 Maps
6 Gamemodes
+1 Bonus Mutation Mode (Randomizer)
22 Weapons
8 Playable characters
description_short: Fadeout: Underground is a classic-style Third-Person online multiplayer shooter.
